REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (, San Francisco, Ca. 94103)
Off Calendar Nov-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Zarich for (administrator) Karen Ann Butulia.

The sale for improved real property was confirmed at $575,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 10/26/16. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond has been waived.

Judge: Paul Alvarado Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Jan-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
